title: hieracium villosum subsp. villosissimum
intro: Hieracium villosum subsp. villosissimum, also known as the woolly hawk's beard or hairy hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antihemorrhagic properties. The plant is said to offer health benefits such as reducing swelling and pain, promoting wound healing, and supporting the digestive system. In herbal preparations, Hieracium villosum subsp. villosissimum is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential effects on human health.
